ColumnOrderBy Properties

One Identity Manager API Server

The ColumnOrderBy type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
IsDescending
Gets or sets a flag indicating whether descending sort will be used.
SortColumn
Returns the column which is used for sorting.
